raw.subject: Behind The Chair in Yakima; Back to school is around the corner.
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you're getting ready for back to school, and it's great to see 7 barbers available for those haircuts. It really shows you're committed to serving the Yakima community.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and I think for a barbershop that's open to walk-in customers, having a clear menu and hours posted online might help you reach even more people and avoid missing bookings.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea based on the photos and posts you share on Facebook. It includes a menu hero section, so customers can easily see what you offer, as well as a hours block and photo gallery to give them a sense of your vibe.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/behind-the-chair-yakima

I'd love to discuss how to bring this idea to life with a simple, flat fee for local businesses. If you'd like to get details, just reply to this email or give me a quick call.
